name: Skylark Minerals Ltd.
description: Skylark Minerals Limited is an Australia-based resources exploration and development company focused on delivering sustainable growth and shareholder value. The company employs a dual-track strategy that combines rapid, acquisition-led expansion with targeted, systematic exploration across a diverse portfolio of assets. Its key projects include gold exploration in Côte d’Ivoire, critical minerals in Brazil, and copper and gold exploration in Australia. Guided by an experienced executive team, Skylark Minerals leverages a strong balance sheet and flexible capital structure to advance its highly prospective natural resource projects in the global resources sector.
